##RRUFFID=R110164
##IDEAL CHEMISTRY=NaSr_3_CaY(CO_3_)_6_·3H_2_O
##LOCALITY=Mont St. Hilaire, Quebec, Canada
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Donald M Doell
##DESCRIPTION=Aggregate of greenish-grey platy crystals in a prismatic hexagonal stacking, associated with siderite, rhodochrosite and albite
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral has been confirmed by single-crystal X-ray diffraction
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R110164
##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Single crystal, powder profile is calculated
##CELL PARAMETERS=a: 9.019 b: 8.992 c: 6.759 alpha: 116.44 beta: 102.85 gamma: 60.06 volume: 425.3 crystal system: triclinic
##FILETYPE=Raman Processed
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=780
